ticket.subject: Welcome to Shopify Partner PluginHive! We’re here to help you save both time and money
ticket.raw_subject: Welcome to Shopify Partner PluginHive! We’re here to help you save both time and money
ticket.description:
Hello Client,

 Greeting from Shopify Partner PluginHive!

 Thank you for installing our Shopify App - **“PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label App”** on pqaqzs-c0.myshopify.com

 Our team would like to assist you with the complete app onboarding.

 We request you let us know a suitable time for the onboarding session, which will not take more than 10 mins. Feel free to reply to this email (or) share your contact number, we will get in touch with you.

 You can also refer our documentation to set up the app and start shipping - click here to know more

 Looking forward to hearing from you.

 Thanks and Regards,
 Team PluginHive
https://www.pluginhive.com/about/#team

comments.body:
US Store
113071 orders in last 14 days
No carrier account added yet
Called the customer and they said they are yet to look into the app. They are looking to use the app with FedEx and USPS carriers. Customer already has a FedEx account created and would look into connect USPS through EasyPost. Customer had some queries related to product details and packaging and they were resolved in the call. Informed a mail will be left with AL so they can book a slot for the call with us.

comments.body:
BOT Response -

Thank you for installing the PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label App — welcome aboard!

To help you hit the ground running before our onboarding session, here are the key steps to get the app ready:

1. Approve the subscription plan inside the app if you have not done so already — the app will prompt you on first login.
2. Add your carrier account credentials under the Carriers section in the app (for example, FedEx OAuth credentials, UPS OAuth credentials, or DHL Site ID and password, depending on which carrier you use).
3. Set your From Address under Settings > From Address — this is the origin address used on all your shipments.
4. Make sure product weights and dimensions are entered in your Shopify admin under Products > each product > Shipping section, as the app reads this data directly from Shopify.

If you would like to show live carrier rates at checkout, please note this requires a Shopify plan that supports Carrier Calculated Shipping (not available on Basic Shopify with monthly billing).

Please reply with a convenient time for the onboarding call or share your contact number and we will reach out — it typically takes about 10 minutes and we will walk through your specific carrier setup together.
comments.html_body:
BOT Response - 
 
Thank you for installing the PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label App — welcome aboard!
 
To help you hit the ground running before our onboarding session, here are the key steps to get the app ready:
 
1. Approve the subscription plan inside the app if you have not done so already — the app will prompt you on first login.
2. Add your carrier account credentials under the Carriers section in the app (for example, FedEx OAuth credentials, UPS OAuth credentials, or DHL Site ID and password, depending on which carrier you use).
3. Set your From Address under Settings > From Address — this is the origin address used on all your shipments.
4. Make sure product weights and dimensions are entered in your Shopify admin under Products > each product > Shipping section, as the app reads this data directly from Shopify.
 
If you would like to show live carrier rates at checkout, please note this requires a Shopify plan that supports Carrier Calculated Shipping (not available on Basic Shopify with monthly billing).
 
Please reply with a convenient time for the onboarding call or share your contact number and we will reach out — it typically takes about 10 minutes and we will walk through your specific carrier setup together.

comments.body:
Hi Sagar,



Thanks for the call today. A couple questions:

-For products: can we set weight/dimensions on a variant level? It looks like PH Multi only imported our products at the parent level. This is an issue, as some products come in different sizes and will have different weight/dimensions.

-Does PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label support FedEx One Rate shipping? I don’t see it on the list of services available. This is a big part of our shipping.



Thank you,



**Ryan Hoarfrost**

ryan@paddlepalace.com

(503)777-2266| (800)547-5891

www.paddlepalace.com

![PaddlePalace_LogoCentered_RGB](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/0pzirO2mIIzFz7VWmJyBBTr0m/?name=image001.jpg)

comments.body:
BOT Response -

Hi Ryan,

Happy to follow up in writing on the variant weight and dimensions question from your call.

For weight per variant: Yes, the app fully supports this. In Shopify, each variant has its own weight field under Products > the product > each variant's Shipping section. When the app imports your catalog, it reads each variant's individual weight, so different sizes or configurations with different weights will each carry their own values over.

For dimensions (length, width, height): Shopify stores dimensions at the parent product level rather than per individual variant, so the app imports those from the parent and applies them across all variants of that product. If your variants genuinely need different box dimensions, please update the parent product's shipping dimensions in Shopify to reflect the most common or largest size, and we can discuss packaging configurations on the onboarding call.

On the variants showing only at the parent level: this is easy to fix. In the app, go to the Products page and click Force Import All. This re-imports your full catalog and creates a separate entry for each variant with its own weight. For a large catalog it may take a few minutes to complete. After the import, confirm that each variant in Shopify already has its weight entered in its Shipping section so those values carry over correctly.

Please use the booking link Sagar shared to pick a time for the onboarding call — we will walk through your FedEx and USPS setup and make sure your product and packaging configuration is set up correctly for both carriers.
comments.html_body:
BOT Response - 
 
Hi Ryan,
 
Happy to follow up in writing on the variant weight and dimensions question from your call.
 
For weight per variant: Yes, the app fully supports this. In Shopify, each variant has its own weight field under Products > the product > each variant's Shipping section. When the app imports your catalog, it reads each variant's individual weight, so different sizes or configurations with different weights will each carry their own values over.
 
For dimensions (length, width, height): Shopify stores dimensions at the parent product level rather than per individual variant, so the app imports those from the parent and applies them across all variants of that product. If your variants genuinely need different box dimensions, please update the parent product's shipping dimensions in Shopify to reflect the most common or largest size, and we can discuss packaging configurations on the onboarding call.
 
On the variants showing only at the parent level: this is easy to fix. In the app, go to the Products page and click Force Import All. This re-imports your full catalog and creates a separate entry for each variant with its own weight. For a large catalog it may take a few minutes to complete. After the import, confirm that each variant in Shopify already has its weight entered in its Shipping section so those values carry over correctly.
 
Please use the booking link Sagar shared to pick a time for the onboarding call — we will walk through your FedEx and USPS setup and make sure your product and packaging configuration is set up correctly for both carriers.

comments.body:
Hello Ryan,

Thank you for your response.

The app consider the weight provided to the product variants in shopify. The dimensions to the product variants has to be added in the app and this can be done in bulk by clicking on Export CSV where a file gets downloaded, add the dimensions to all the variants in the file and import it.
To view the weight and dimensions of the product variants, click on the + sign next to the product name.
Please refer to the screenshot shared below for reference.

The PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label app support One Rate shipping. As one rate is a special service, it will be available under the App Settings -> Carriers -> FedEx -> Other Details -> Enable FedEx® Third Party Consignee (Applicable only for International Shipments) (as shown in below screenshot).

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/PWwC8RrvPZTiqTvoULZUHRxgQ/?name=image.png)

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/k9Iu6PhVT8xfd1qmNK0VFRuvz/?name=image.png)

Best regards,
Sagar K S
PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Ryan,
 
Thank you for your response. 
 
The app consider the weight provided to the product variants in shopify. The dimensions to the product variants has to be added in the app and this can be done in bulk by clicking on Export CSV where a file gets downloaded, add the dimensions to all the variants in the file and import it. 
To view the weight and dimensions of the product variants, click on the + sign next to the product name. 
Please refer to the screenshot shared below for reference. 
 
The PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label app support One Rate shipping. As one rate is a special service, it will be available under the App Settings -> Carriers -> FedEx -> Other Details -> Enable FedEx® Third Party Consignee (Applicable only for International Shipments) (as shown in below screenshot).
 

 

 
Best regards,
Sagar K S
PluginHive

comments.body:
Hi Sagar,


FedEx One Rate is a domestic shipping service. By “Enable 3rd party consignee (applicable only for international shipments)”, that will enable One Rate?



Best regards,
Ryan Hoarfrost

comments.body:
Hello Ryan,

Sorry for the confusion.

Wrong option was highlighted in the screenshot.

For your store, the One Rate will be shown automatically wherever it is applicable.

So, you can check for a couple of orders by selecting a FedEx box for packaging.

If any assistance is needed here, do let us know. We wcan have a call and discuss about the same.

Best regards,
Sagar K S
PluginHive

comments.body:
Request #386104 "Give Multi Carrier Shipping Labe..." was closed and merged into this request. Last comment in request #386104:

Hello Client,

 We regret that you had to uninstall our Shopify App - **“PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label App”** from pqaqzs-c0.myshopify.com

 If you have faced any difficulties with the app, we can hop on a call to assist you. Or if you are awaiting your store launch, do let us know so we can extend your free trial period.


> **Did you know?**
>
> - _Our shipping app is certified by top shipping carriers like UPS, FedEx, USPS, Stamps.com, DHL Express, Australia Post, Canada Post, Post Nord & many more._
> - _This app will allow you to ship with multiple carrier(s)._
> - _Print 100 (s) of shipping labels in a single click._
> - _Our shipping experts will provide you with quick and reliable support._



 Let’s schedule a quick call to discuss how exactly we can help you reach your shipping requirements.

 We would like to hear from you.

 Thanks and Regards,
 Team PluginHive
https://www.pluginhive.com/about/#team

Hello Client,

We regret that you had to uninstall our Shopify App - “PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label App” from pqaqzs-c0.myshopify.com

If you have faced any difficulties with the app, we can hop on a call to assist you. Or if you are awaiting your store launch, do let us know so we can extend your free trial period.

Did you know?

  • Our shipping app is certified by top shipping carriers like UPS, FedEx, USPS, Stamps.com, DHL Express, Australia Post, Canada Post, Post Nord & many more.
  • This app will allow you to ship with multiple carrier(s).
  • Print 100 (s) of shipping labels in a single click.
  • Our shipping experts will provide you with quick and reliable support.

Let’s schedule a quick call to discuss how exactly we can help you reach your shipping requirements.

We would like to hear from you.

Thanks and Regards,
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello Ryan,

I am Priyanka from the PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label App by PluginHive.

We noticed you installed our app "PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label App" for Shopify and have decided to uninstall it.

I would like to know if you have faced any difficulties or are missing any needed features due to which you have decided to uninstall the app.

The app helps you display calculated rates, generate shipping labels, and send live tracking updates to customers.

We can schedule a free onboarding call over Zoom at your convenience to discuss and help you with the setup. If so, please book a slot for your availability using this link: **[****Click Here****]**

Looking forward to hearing back from you.

Thanks and Regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive
